artifacts.summary: Research report identifying gap in /todo orphan detection where completed tasks in TODO.md but not in state.json are not being archived
Comparative analysis of .claude/ and .opencode/ /todo implementations, identifying filesystem-first orphan detection pattern and TODO.md cross-referencing strategy

active_projects.description: Fix /todo command's orphan detection to properly handle completed tasks that appear in TODO.md but have been manually removed from state.json. Currently, tasks like OC_138, OC_139, OC_140 are marked [COMPLETED] in TODO.md and have directories in specs/, but are not being archived because they're not in state.json's active_projects array. The fix should scan TODO.md for completed/abandoned entries and cross-reference with both state.json and filesystem to identify orphans.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive audit of .opencode/ directory: 177 directories, only 20 have README.md (11.3%), 157 need creation. Critical gaps in core system directories and extensions. Docs directory needs organization (4 loose files). Navigation patterns inconsistent.

6-phase implementation plan: Phase 1- Core system directories (20 dirs, 2hrs), Phase 2- Extension roots (11 dirs, 1hr), Phase 3- Extension structure (~100 dirs, 2.5hrs), Phase 4- Docs organization (45min), Phase 5- Remaining directories (~26 dirs, 1.5hrs), Phase 6- Verification (45min). Total: 6-8 hours.

Documentation needed for progressive disclosure patterns from OC_137: stage-progressive loading, conditional context injection, discovery-layer pattern, context budget guidelines, and troubleshooting. Updates required to context-loading-best-practices.md

active_projects.description: Follow-up to OC_137 Phase 8. Update context-loading-best-practices.md with progressive disclosure patterns: stage-progressive loading, conditional injection, discovery-layer pattern, context budgets, and troubleshooting guidance.

artifacts.summary: Initial POC research: Implement stage-progressive loading in skill-planner, load status-markers in Stage 1, defer plan-format.md to Stage 3. Expected 40-50% context reduction.

Systematic review of entire .opencode/ agent system for progressive context disclosure improvements. Identified optimization opportunities across 11 skills with 30-60% potential reduction per skill through stage-progressive loading, context consolidation, and 2026 best practices.
3-phase implementation plan: baseline measurement, stage-progressive loading implementation in skill-planner/SKILL.md, testing and validation. Expected 40-50% Stage 1 context reduction.

active_projects.description: Follow-up to OC_137 Phase 7. Demonstrate stage-progressive context loading in skill-planner: load minimal context in Stage 1 (status-markers only), defer format specs to Stage 3. Proof-of-concept for ~40-50% context reduction.

artifacts.summary: Root cause identified: synchronization protocol only updates state.json and TODO.md, missing plan file line 4 metadata status. Plan files have TWO status levels (plan-level and phase-level), but only phase-level is synchronized.

active_projects.description: Fix the three-way status synchronization gap. When tasks complete, plan file line 4 status metadata is not updated while state.json and TODO.md are correctly synchronized. Need to update phase-synchronization.md protocol and skill-implementer to include plan metadata status updates.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of Neovim and WezTerm configurations showing no automatic directory-changing behavior
Research report documenting OAuth2 token expiration as root cause and fix procedure
3-phase implementation plan for fixing Gmail OAuth2 authentication
Research on systemd user service configuration for ProtonMail Bridge auto-start, covering best practices, home-manager integration patterns, and implementation recommendations
4-phase plan covering service verification, integration testing, and documentation for ProtonMail Bridge systemd user service
